title: Painted Blocks
description: Painted Blocks – Custom Mini Blocks Made Easy!
body:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: USAGE GUIDELINES
If you're planning to use this on a server or modpack,
please refer to:
https://gamedash43.github.io/dash-mcl-licenses/#usage

![Title Text "Dash's Painted Blocks"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b374a7c8861b26b4f63a4b0afa42c1f5290a241b_0.webp)

This datapack provides a **simple, vanilla-friendly** way to create custom mini blocks using a crafting table.

# 🛠️**Crafting Recipes**
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b794755344c428446b294c870c03df470b8a8fc7.png)
1. Shapeless Quartz Block Recipe.
2. Player Head Recipe (same as the quartz block recipe but replaces the quartz block with a player head).

# 📜**How to Use**
1. Get a Book and Quill.
2. Paste a Base64 texture value on the first page of the book from a site like [https://minecraft-heads.com/](https://minecraft-heads.com/).
3. Hold the unsigned Book and Quill in your main hand.
4. Craft the recipe to get a player head with the given texture.
![Example Value pasted on page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de94d235feee7ea70a83744a5518b2a4a50a6a8d.png)


## ❓FAQ

<details>
<summary>The painted block is either blank or displays a Steve/Alex/etc. skin.</summary>
This means either you weren't holding a Book and Quill, or you were holding one but the pasted value was not valid. If rewriting the value does not work, join the Discord to ask for help.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I report a bug?</summary>
Join the discord and DM me or write a message in the reports channel.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Do I need a resource pack?</summary>
No, this datapack uses the vanilla player head functionality, so no resource pack is needed.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How does this datapack impact performance?</summary>
This datapack has no ticking functions, so it should have no performance impact.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I uninstall this datapack?</summary>
*Just run the command "/function dash.chead:uninstall"
  *This is only needed pre V2.0
</details>
